free_text: Investigation of the resonance structure of neutron
in the 2 eV-100 keV energy range
thermal power 10 kW, neutron  pulse repetition
rate is 100 Hz, pulse duration 4 microsec
Two boron counters CHM-12 for neutron beam
Neutron energy resolution 01.% at 1 eV, 30% at 100 keV.
The group transmissions and cross-sections were
M.M. Ref. of Engl.translation was added.
